title: Lengthened Padlock with 3 Keys, 40mm Long Shackle Padlock High Security Locker Heavy Duty Keys Lock for Warehouses Container Doors Garage Shed Gates Bicycle
features: 【Long Shackle Design】1 pack 40mm heavy duty lengthened padlock with 3 pcs keys. It total measures 5.1 inch long and width of 1.57 inch, you can save money to purchase chains, perfect for securing larger items and offers more flexibility in usage

【Durable & Sturdy】Made from high-quality iron materials, our heavy duty lock is designed to withstand wear and tear, ensuring long-lasting durability. Crafted with precision and built to last, our lock provides unparalleled security for your belongings

【Versatile Usage】Whether you need to secure your cabinets, lockers, bike, warehouse or personal items, our long shackle padlock is suitable for various applications. Perfect for gyms, lockers, cabinets, tool boxes, garages, sheds, door hasps, gates, fences, luggage, suitcase, cupboard, cabinets, etc. Its adaptable design makes it a practical choice for your security needs

【Unique Design】The long padlock matches 3 keys that can be used by multiple people and prevent key loss, which can need of keys for family; The double drainage holes at the bottom can prevent water accumulation on rainy days

【Safe Padlock】Security lock padlock can prevent others from unlocking locks, each lock has undergone strict inspection and repeated testing, and can be used repeatedly without damage. If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase, contact us, and we'll make it right
description: The padlock can be widely used for shed gate, fence gate, school, employee, gym & sports locker, case, toolbox, gate, hasp cabinet & storage and etc
